channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 37: Feuerwehreinsatz Betrieb ab Nußdorfer Straße U
70A: rescue operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation. [On 18.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation.
[On 18.06.2026]

item.title: 25: foreign traffic accident
item.description: No operation between Kagran U and Donauspital U. Switch to 26A. expected duration: 07:30 watch. Reason: Foreign traffic accident in the … [On 18.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
No operation between Kagran U and Donauspital U. Switch to 26A. expected duration: 07:30 watch. Reason: Foreign traffic accident in the …
[On 18.06.2026]

item.title: 61A: Liesing, fire station
item.description: Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf, Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing, fire station From: Siebenhirtenstraße 12 To: Siebenhirtenstraße 8-10 Duration … [17.06.2026 – 22.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf, Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing, fire station From: Siebenhirtenstraße 12 To: Siebenhirtenstraße 8-10 Duration …
[17.06.2026 – 22.06.2026]

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Wien Praterstern
item.description: Due to construction works there are no trains between Wien Floridsdorf station (U) and Wien Praterstern station (U) from 04.07.2026 to 06.09.2026. [Since 17.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works there are no trains between Wien Floridsdorf station (U) and Wien Praterstern station (U) from 04.07.2026 to 06.09.2026.
[Since 17.06.2026]

item.title: 10A/63A: crane works Grieshofgasse on 24.06.2026
item.description: Due to crane works in the Grieshofgasse, the 10A and 63A buses must be redirected. [16.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to crane works in the Grieshofgasse, the 10A and 63A buses must be redirected.
[16.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]

item.title: 10A/37A/40A: construction works Dänenstraße
item.description: Because of construction works in the Max-Emanuel-Straße, Peter-Jordan-Straße and Dänenstraße lines 10A, 37A and 40A are redirected. [01.06.2026 – 01.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Max-Emanuel-Straße, Peter-Jordan-Straße and Dänenstraße lines 10A, 37A and 40A are redirected.
[01.06.2026 – 01.06.2027]

item.title: Donaufelder Straße crossing with Plateau Theodor-Körner-Gasse and Plankenbüchlergasse
item.description: Vehicle traffic, including public transport, can be maintained in all existing driving relationships. [25.05.2026 – 26.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Vehicle traffic, including public transport, can be maintained in all existing driving relationships.
[25.05.2026 – 26.07.2026]

item.title: Hernals Hauptstraße from Redtenbachergasse and Schadinagasse to Julius-Meinl-Gasse
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) will be carried out in the actual area of Hernals main road by day, night and sometimes also on weekends … [19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) will be carried out in the actual area of Hernals main road by day, night and sometimes also on weekends …
[19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]
